**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Tianyan Information Industry Co., Ltd. presents a severe disparity between its registered manufacturing classification and its actual operational capacity. Despite a substantial paid-in capital of 20.1 million RMB and an official classification as an 'Electronic Device Manufacturer', the company reported only 1 insured employee in 2024. A single-employee entity cannot engage in the 'manufacturing of electronic products, mechanical products, and instruments' as claimed in its extensive business scope. As a Sole Proprietorship, it functions entirely as an asset-light corporate shell or a project bidding vehicle for its owner. Its actual operations likely involve subcontracting systems integration (security/communications), IT consulting, or utilizing its capital to bid on energy-saving renovation projects and HR outsourcing contracts, rather than engaging in any physical production.
